name: video-tools
description: Local, free, transcript-driven video editing + auto-Shorts. Edit your video by deleting words; auto-clean dead air; generate captioned vertical clips. Runs on ffmpeg + Whisper — no subscription.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=api && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=api && npm run typecheck --workspace=web
